name: node-libzsh
description: Node.js native module exposing libzsh parser and ZLE for hybrid zsh/JavaScript shells

scripts.preinstall: cd 3rdparty/libzsh && if [ "$(uname)" = "Darwin" ]; then export SDKROOT=$(xcrun --show-sdk-path); fi && cmake -B build && cmake --build build
scripts.rebuild: cd 3rdparty/libzsh && if [ "$(uname)" = "Darwin" ]; then export SDKROOT=$(xcrun --show-sdk-path); fi && cmake -B build && cmake --build build && node-gyp rebuild

author: jhanssen
